must_do.full_text:
How to duplicate yourself into Claude in a weekend: 

(even if you've never written a prompt before)

1. Download the desktop app.
☑ Go to claude .com/download
☑ Set Opus 4.7 as default
☑ Turn ON Extended Thinking

2. Open Cowork mode.
☑ Cowork = where your voice lives
☑ https://t.co/hz2ztgwLzS

must_do.full_text: You truly become an adult the day you realise Claude starts its reasoning process with "this is genuinely interesting" in order to force itself to respond as if whatever you just said were genuinely interesting.
